name: John Carrozza
bio: John Carrozza received all positive ratings from the Alliance bar associations, tied on composite score with his opponent Jarrett Knox. He has no public interest law background — his career has been exclusively in private practice. He is a member of the Knights of Columbus. This is a values-based distinction rather than a disqualifying issue; both candidates are rated as qualified by bar associations.
background: Private practice attorney. No public interest law background. Member, Knights of Columbus.

bar_ratings.alliance_detail: All positive ratings from Alliance bar associations — tied composite with opponent
